_notes: Vague-verb regex catches verbs that historically led to clarification debt.
Add new patterns here as eval surfaces missed prompts. No code change required.
Patterns are case-insensitive; tested via `new RegExp(regex, 'i').test(prompt)`.

examples: improve X / make X better / make X look better
build the new X / build it
do that / do them all / do it
Are you asking to — write the logic, wire the scheduler, or add a UI trigger?
What does 'proper Y' mean — option A, option B, or option C?

liveVsLocalQuestion.description: Detects when Q2 asks about deployment location (live URL vs local file).
